note: Seed real-world results here as { "matchId": { "home": <goals>, "away": <goals> } }. Group matches use IDs like "A1".."A6" (see fixtures generation order in sim.js). Knockout matches use their numeric ID (73..104). Empty by default so the app opens with pure pre-tournament predictions; the user enters results in the UI and they persist to localStorage, overriding this file.
